title: WebAssembly Sandboxing for Secure Plugin Systems
author: Cypress Allen
Security Engineer
description: Run untrusted code safely with WASM sandboxing—but side-channel attacks leak data
content:
WASM provides strong isolation for running untrusted code safely.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Sandbox Escape (2038)](/docs/articles/sandbox-escape-2038)
